description: Test quality check L04 #1 for plateau6 (CityGML 3.0). Building bldg_b3eef114 has bldg:class with codeSpace pointing at the i-UR 4.0 absolute URL https://www.geospatial.jp/iur/codelists/4.0/Building_class.xml (resolvable via the codeSpace filename fallback), but the code value 100 is not defined in that codelist. So the codeSpace resolves yet the value is invalid: L04エラー=1, 不正なcodeSpace数=0. The other building (bldg_b3eef115) is clean. This is the CityGML 3.0 counterpart of plateau4/01-01-common/L04_01; the only material difference from plateau4 is the codeSpace form (relative ../../codelists/... -> absolute https URL), which exercises the fallback resolution branch that plateau4 does not. The objectlist xlsx under fixtures/plateau6-citymodel/ is a stand-in (copied from plateau4) until the i-UR 4.0 取得項目一覧 is finalized.
